lanes.label: Source Fidelity
lanes.description: Checks whether source metadata, locators, and extracted observations match the cited software artifact or record.

lanes.label: Control Fit
lanes.description: Checks whether the finding and claim map to the intended supply-chain control without drifting into another control area.

lanes.label: Risk Framing
lanes.description: Checks whether risk and assurance language stays proportional to the observed evidence.

lanes.label: Operational Boundary
lanes.description: Checks whether release, version, dependency, repository, and time-window boundaries are visible near the claim.
